name: Classic Scrum Delivery
description: Classic Scrum flow with explicit handoffs across Product Owner, BA, SA, engineering, QA, and release ownership.

stages.description: Define objective, value, and acceptance criteria.
Refine requirement details, edge cases, and constraints.
Build the feature and supporting tests.
Peer review and quality checks before QA.
Validate behavior, regression, and acceptance checks.
Final product acceptance and release readiness.
